scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --handle-input --names client,server "pnpm run --filter @exsit/client dev" "pnpm run --filter @exsit/server watch"
scripts.prod: concurrently --kill-others --handle-input --names client,server "pnpm run --filter @exsit/client preview" "pnpm run --filter @exsit/server start"
